No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or economic well-being.

Zero Hunger.reason: The 'Food and diet' topic offers a minimal, inferred link to personal nutrition (Target 2.2), though not to broader food security issues.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course title and content explicitly focus on mental health, self-exploration, stress, addictive substances, and mental illness, directly aligning with Targets 3.4 and 3.5.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides knowledge and skills for personal development and self-awareness, contributing to tertiary education and relevant learning outcomes (Targets 4.3, 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the syllabus relates to gender-specific issues, discrimination, or empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Discussions on 'Mental illness' and 'Social environment and health' can foster understanding, potentially reducing stigma and promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The topic 'Addictive substances' offers a tangential link to responsible consumption of harmful products, aligning weakly with SDG 12.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence found in the course description or weekly topics.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Skills in emotional awareness and stress coping can indirectly contribute to reducing interpersonal violence, aligning weakly with Target 16.1.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No evidence found regarding partnerships, international cooperation, or resource mobilization for SDG implementation.
